title: 1.5 Ethiopian Biologists and Their Contributions
description: Comprehensive coverage of Ethiopian biologists including Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen, Dr. Aklilu Lemma, and Professor Gebissa Ejeta, their research areas, discoveries, and impacts on society.

questions.question: Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen is a biologist and academic member of staff at which university?
Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen works in which department at Addis Ababa University?
options: Department of Biology, Faculty of Science
questions.correctAnswer: Department of Biology, Faculty of Science

questions.question: How long has Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen worked in the Department of Biology at Addis Ababa University?
Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen received her PhD specializing in which field?
From which university did Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen receive her PhD?
One of Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen's research areas is the assessment of the impact of which hazards on humans?
Professor Yalemtsehay's research on chemical pesticide hazards covers which areas?
options: Almost all government farms including Upper Awash agricultural farms and private horticultural farms in the Rift Valley region
Only government farms in northern Ethiopia
questions.correctAnswer: Almost all government farms including Upper Awash agricultural farms and private horticultural farms in the Rift Valley region

questions.question: What is the other area of Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen's research?
options: The use of plants as medicine against human and animal diseases
questions.correctAnswer: The use of plants as medicine against human and animal diseases

questions.question: How many scientific papers has Professor Yalemtsehay Mekonnen published in reputable journals?
Professor Yalemtsehay's research areas include which type of tests on useful plant extracts?
options: In vivo and in vitro physiological tests
questions.correctAnswer: In vivo and in vitro physiological tests

questions.question: Professor Yalemtsehay has done notable research on medicinal plants especially on which plant?
Schistosomiasis, also known as Bilharzia, is what type of disease?
How many people does Schistosomiasis affect in Africa, South America, Asia, and parts of the Caribbean?
Schistosomiasis is caused by which type of organism?
The parasitic flatworms that cause Schistosomiasis spend part of their lifecycle in which organisms?
Once inside a person, where do Schistosomiasis parasites infest?
options: The blood vessels, liver, kidneys, bladder, and other organs
questions.correctAnswer: The blood vessels, liver, kidneys, bladder, and other organs

questions.question: Some of the most important work in finding a way of controlling the Schistosomiasis parasite was carried out by which Ethiopian biologist?
When did Dr. Aklilu Lemma begin his work on Schistosomiasis?
Dr. Aklilu Lemma began investigating freshwater snails around which area in northern Ethiopia?
What did Dr. Aklilu Lemma notice downstream of women washing clothes?
options: More dead snails than anywhere else
questions.correctAnswer: More dead snails than anywhere else

questions.question: What were the women using to make washing suds?
options: The soapberry called 'Endod' in Amharic (Phytolacca dodecane Dr.a)
questions.correctAnswer: The soapberry called 'Endod' in Amharic (Phytolacca dodecane Dr.a)

questions.question: What happened when Endod suds were put in a container with live snails?
Back in the laboratory, what did Dr. Aklilu Lemma show about Endod berries?
options: They could kill snails at very high concentrations only
If dried, crushed, and diluted in water they would kill snails at very low concentrations
They had no effect on snails
questions.correctAnswer: If dried, crushed, and diluted in water they would kill snails at very low concentrations

questions.question: What did the World Health Organization recommend to control snails that was extremely expensive?
Which of the following is true about Endod compared to chemical molluscicides?
options: It is cheap, well known by local people, and environment friendly as it breaks down naturally within about two days
questions.correctAnswer: It is cheap, well known by local people, and environment friendly as it breaks down naturally within about two days

questions.question: Before water treatment with Endod, what percentage of children aged 1-6 years old were infected with Schistosomiasis?
After water treatment with Endod, what percentage of children aged 1-6 years old were infected with Schistosomiasis?
Where have Dr. Aklilu Lemma's results been published?
What did Dr. Aklilu Lemma develop for local communities?
options: Programs for local communities to treat their water
questions.correctAnswer: Programs for local communities to treat their water

questions.question: Where is the use of Endod-based molluscicides spreading?
Professor Gebissa Ejeta specializes in which field?
On which crop did Professor Gebissa Ejeta do his research?
From which university did Professor Gebissa Ejeta get his PhD?
Professor Gebissa Ejeta helped develop Africa's first commercial hybrid strain of which crop?
What are the characteristics of the sorghum variety developed by Professor Gebissa Ejeta?
options: It needs more water but yields more grain
It needs less water, is resistant to drought, and yields more grain than traditional varieties
It needs the same amount of water but grows faster
It is resistant to pests but has lower yield
questions.correctAnswer: It needs less water, is resistant to drought, and yields more grain than traditional varieties

questions.question: Professor Gebissa Ejeta developed sorghum varieties resistant to which parasitic weed?
How much more yield do Professor Gebissa Ejeta's sorghum varieties produce compared to others?
In what year was Professor Gebissa Ejeta awarded the World Food Prize?
The World Food Prize is described as which type of prize?
options: The most prestigious science prize in the world
The most prestigious agricultural prize in the world
The most prestigious medical prize in the world
The most prestigious environmental prize in the world
questions.correctAnswer: The most prestigious agricultural prize in the world

questions.question: What other award has Professor Gebissa Ejeta received from Ethiopia?
options: The National Hero award of Ethiopia
questions.correctAnswer: The National Hero award of Ethiopia

questions.question: How far did Professor Gebissa Ejeta walk to school every Sunday evening?
Which schools did Professor Gebissa Ejeta attend before his PhD?
options: Addis Ababa University and Haramaya University
Jimma Agricultural and Technical School and then Alemaya College
University of Heidelberg and Purdue University
University of Cambridge and Oxford University
questions.correctAnswer: Jimma Agricultural and Technical School and then Alemaya College
